LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF TONY SANDERS' MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD TO JANUARY 30, 2014 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 302. COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF TO PROVIDE NOTICE OF HEARING DATE TO ALL PARTIES/COUNSEL OF RECORD AND PROVIDE COURTESY COPIES OF ALL MOVING PAPERS IN COMPLIANCE WITH SAN FRANCISCO LOCAL RULE 2.6B. JUDGE: ERNEST GOLDSMITH, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: TONY VAUGHN, CSR #6185

LAW AND MOTION, 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF TONY SANDERS' MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD IS OFF CALENDAR. COUNSEL FAILED TO PROVIDE COURTESY COPIES AS REQUIRED BY LOCAL RULE 2.6B AND THE COURT'S ORDER ISSUED ON JANUARY 16, 2014. JUDGE: ERNEST GOLDSMITH, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.

PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO SERVE ITS OPPOSITION PAPERS FILED ON JANUARY 16 TO DEFENDANTS COUNSEL NO LATER THAN MARCH 1, 2013. REPLY TO BE FILED ON MARCH 13, 2013. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185 = (302/MJM)

LAW AND MOTION, 302, RULING: THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. AT THE CONCLUSION OF ARGUMENT, DEFENDANTS CALIFORNIA PACIFIC MEDICAL CENTER & SUTTER HEALTH SACRAMENTO SIERRA REGION'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED. PLAINTIFF HAS PLED SUFFICIENT FACTS TO ALLEGE CAUSES OF ACTION FOR WILLFUL MISCONDUCT, NEGLIGENT INFLICTION OF EMOTIONAL DISTRESS, AND RECKLESS MISCONDUCT. THE PLEADINGS ARE NOT UNCERTAIN.
